# Copied InternScience/scp Skills

These skills were selected because they are physics, mathematics, materials, experimental-analysis, or domain-general scientific workflow skills. Explicitly biomedical, drug-discovery, clinical, genomics, virology, and structural-biology skills were not copied.

## Copied

- `energy_conversion`
- `experimental_data_processing`
- `geometric-volume-calculation`
- `geometry_trigonometry`
- `material-density-volume-calculation`
- `measurement-error-analysis`
- `mobility_analysis`
- `nuclear_physics`
- `statistical_error_analysis`
- `unit-conversion-nanoscale`
- `code_execution_analysis`
- `scientific-literature-search`
- `web_literature_mining`
